brief_notes: Well-validated structural biology methods paper. Tables provide comprehensive benchmarking: Rfree improvement with paired t-tests, geometry metrics with p-values, resolution-stratified recapitulation rates, BIC conformer distribution, B-factor sampling ablation, and cryo-EM demonstrations. The 144-structure test set with 72 CATH folds and 24 space groups is rigorously designed. Synthetic resolution study quantitatively demonstrates resolution limits.
